data.title: Core manufacturing for 1.5 MW Pele microreactor starts in Lynchburg; expected to generate electricity by 2028.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. has begun fabricating the reactor core for the Pele microreactor at their BWXT Innovation Campus in Lynchburg, Virginia. The Pele microreactor, a 1.5-megawatt demonstration unit for the Department of Defense Strategic Capabilities Office, is designed to produce electricity starting in 2028. This gas-cooled reactor is portable and intended for transportation.

data.title: Montrose Environmental Group (NYSE: MEG) to announce Q2 2025 results in Little Rock, Arkansas.
data.description: Montrose Environmental Group, Inc. (NYSE: MEG) has revealed the schedule for the release of its second-quarter 2025 financial results. The company, based in Little Rock, Arkansas, will make the announcement through Business Wire. Investors and interested parties can anticipate significant information regarding the performance and financial standing of Montrose Environmental Group, Inc. during this period.

data.title: Archer Aviation Inc. (NYSE: ACHR) to report Q2 2025 results on August 11, 2025, with a webcast at 2:00 pm PT. Phone: +1 404-975-4839 or +1 833-470-1428, code 100811.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Archer Aviation Inc. (NYSE: ACHR) is set to release its Q2 2025 operational update and financial results post-market closure on Monday, August 11, 2025. A live webcast to go over the results is scheduled for 2:00 p.m. PT. The webcast and replay can be accessed at investors.archer.com. For the conference call, dial +1 404-975-4839 (domestic) or +1 833-470-1428 (international), entering the access code 100811. Archer Aviation will present its financial figures and performance overview during this session.

data.title: Ocean Power Technologies partners with reseller in Latin America for $3 million purchase commitment, expanding market reach in Mexico.
data.description: A recent agreement was made that involves a commitment to purchase OPT products amounting to $3 million. This deal also aims to broaden the commercial presence of Intelligent Maritime Solutions within the Mexican market.

data.title: Logansport Financial Corp reports Q2 net earnings of $413,000, with total assets at $260.2M and total deposits at $223.8M.
data.description: Logansport Financial Corp., the parent company of Logansport Savings Bank, disclosed their financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company reported a net profit of $413,000 or $0.67 per diluted share in comparison to the earnings of $349,000 or $0.57 per diluted share in 2024. For the year so far, their net earnings for 2025 were $790,000 as opposed to $617,000 for 2024. Diluted earnings per share for the first half of 2025 stood at $1.45, a rise from $1.01 for the same period in 2024. As of June 30, 2025, their total assets amounted to $260.2 million, up from $249.6 million in June 2024. Regarding deposits, they registered total deposits of $223.8 million at June 30, 2025, compared to $211.7 million in 2024. In the first half of 2025, the company distributed $0.90 per share in dividends, matching the amount paid out in 2024.

data.title: Broadstone Net Lease invests $61.4 million in three build-to-suit developments in VICTOR, N.Y.
data.description: A company based in Victor, New York, Broadstone Net Lease, has recently revealed plans for three new build-to-suit developments, with a total investment of $61.4 million. This announcement signals the company's continued growth and expansion in the real estate sector.

data.title: Equity Residential appoints Chris Carr (61) to Board of Trustees, increasing members to 11, with nine independent trustees.
data.description: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) based in Chicago, has appointed Chris Carr to its Board of Trustees until the next annual shareholders meeting. With this addition, the Board will now have 11 members, with nine being independent. Mr. Carr, aged 61, meets the criteria of an independent trustee under the NYSE listing standards. He will be part of the Audit and Corporate Governance Committees.

data.title: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. reported Q2 2025 results: Net income $0.05/share, FFO $0.43/share, AFFO $0.44/share, total NOI growth 3.5%.
data.description: In Denver, Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), a prominent healthcare real estate owner, operator, and developer, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. During the second quarter of 2025, the company reported net income amounting to $0.05 per share. Additionally, Nareit FFO reached $0.43 per share, FFO as Adjusted stood at $0.46 per share, AFFO recorded $0.44 per share, and there was a 3.5% growth in Total Merger-Combined Same-Store Cash (Adjusted) NOI.
